log.context:
**What was wrong:** `applyLayoutBuckets()` was called separately on each poll group section (once on the sprite grid at line 1381, once on the generic section at line 1409). Each call created its own "Concluded (N)" collapsible `<details>` element, resulting in duplicate concluded sections on the page. Additionally, the avatar group never called it at all, so concluded avatar polls were never bucketed.

**What was fixed:** Removed both per-section `applyLayoutBuckets()` calls and added a single ...(truncated)
